intro.body: that combine clean design, exceptional user experience, and scalable development practices — turning ideas into polished web products that create real value.

about.title: About
about.summary: Front-End Developer with 3+ years of experience crafting modern, high-performance web experiences. I approach every project with a product mindset — understanding business goals, identifying user needs, and delivering digital solutions that create measurable impact.
about.bio1: I'm Mohamed Wahid — a Front-End Developer specializing in building modern, high-performance web experiences that combine clean design, exceptional UX, and scalable development practices.
about.bio2: Currently pursuing a degree in Computer Science, I've spent the last 3+ years developing websites and web applications — continuously refining my skills in modern front-end technologies, UI/UX principles, performance optimization, and digital product development.
about.bio3: By combining modern development with AI-powered workflows, I accelerate delivery, improve quality, and maintain clean, maintainable, scalable codebases. Whether it's a business website, startup landing page, or custom web application — my goal is always the same: create fast, responsive, user-focused experiences that help businesses stand out.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: End-to-end front-end solutions for businesses, startups, and ambitious brands.

frontend.title: Web Development
frontend.description: Business websites, startup landing pages, corporate sites, portfolios, and service-based web solutions built for performance and results.

creative.title: UI/UX & Interactions
creative.description: Modern UI animations, micro-interactions, responsive layouts, and conversion-oriented design that elevates user experience.

integration.title: Frontend Engineering
integration.description: Figma to responsive website development, custom front-end solutions, REST API integration, and component-based architecture.

ai.title: AI-Assisted Development
ai.description: Leveraging advanced AI workflows to accelerate development, optimize code quality, and deliver polished results efficiently.

work.title: Selected Work
work.subtitle: Real projects — from business platforms to medical digital experiences.

process.title: Development Process
process.subtitle: A systematic, product-oriented approach from first conversation to final delivery.

discovery.title: Discovery
discovery.description: Understanding the project's goals, target audience, business requirements, and user expectations.

planning.title: Planning
planning.description: Creating a clear content structure, user flow, and scalable development approach before implementation.

design.title: Design
design.description: Building clean and intuitive interfaces focused on usability, accessibility, and conversion.

development.title: Development
development.description: Developing responsive, modern, and high-performance front-end solutions using industry best practices.

optimization.title: Optimization
optimization.description: Improving loading speed, responsiveness, SEO performance, and overall user experience.

testing.title: Testing & Delivery
testing.description: Ensuring quality, consistency, responsiveness, and smooth performance across all devices and browsers.

feedback.title: Client Feedback
feedback.subtitle: What clients say about working with MEDOCODE.

contact.title: Let's build
contact.subtitle: Available for new projects. Whether you have a clear brief or just an idea — let's start the conversation.

footer.tagline: Engineered for precision. Building high-performance web experiences.
